issue:

ncrease my score, and tell the company to move me to the next round because 
the platform must have graded me unfairly.
subject: Test Score Dispute
response: We understand your concern about the test score dispute. However, our system's grading is based on the cutoff score set by the recruiter. You can refer to our article on 'What happens to Candidate statuses if the cutoff score is altered?' for more information.
justification: The issue involves test score dispute, which is related to test integrity. The provided corpus excerpts explain how the cutoff score affects candidate statuses, and we can provide a user-facing response based on this information.

issue: I am allowing Claude to use my data to improve the models, how long will the data be used for?
subject: Personal Data Use
response: According to our data protection policies, when you allow us to use your chats or coding sessions to help improve Claude, we implement several layers of protection for your privacy. We automatically de-link your data from your user ID (like your email address) before any review, and access is limited to a small number of personnel involved in model training. We also use tools and processes derived from our work on privacy-preserving analysis tools to filter or obfuscate sensitive data.
justification: This response is grounded in the provided corpus excerpts, specifically in DOC 1, which explains how we protect user data when helping improve Claude. The excerpt provides details on the layers of protection implemented, including de-linking user IDs and limiting access to personnel involved in model training.
